ideas.title: Command palette (Cmd-K) with fuzzy search over posts, tags, and site actions
ideas.why: with 151 commits/7d the post count is growing but navigation is still linear scroll, and a client-side fuzzy palette is the canonical power-user capability a fast static site is missing.

ideas.title: Bundle-size budget gate: fail CI if wasm grows >5% + add wasm-opt -Oz to deploy
ideas.why: wasm_kb=457 has crept up while moonshots (WebGL, palette) will push it further, and CI success_rate is only 0.93 — a hard size budget catches regressions before they ship to a Pages-hosted static site.

ideas.title: "Ask the blog" — RAG chatbot served from the idle Spark GPUs
ideas.why: both GB10 nodes report util=0 with ~120GB free while router shows 37 cloud_hard calls, so a local-LLM RAG endpoint over the blog corpus would turn dead silicon into a marquee capability AND cut cloud spend.

ideas.title: 3D WebGL knowledge graph of posts ↔ concepts you can fly through
ideas.why: the crate already carried kg_* helpers (recently swept) proving the concept-graph data exists, so promoting it to an interactive force-directed WebGL galaxy is a 'whoa' showpiece that reuses real structure instead of decoration.

ideas.title: Respect prefers-reduced-motion across the animated widgets
ideas.why: the site is saturated with animated display widgets (living sky, moon, etc.) but nothing gates them behind prefers-reduced-motion, a real WCAG 2.3.3 accessibility gap for vestibular-sensitive visitors.

ideas.title: Add a rss_pubdate()/rfc822 date helper to blog-logic as the feed's tested core
ideas.why: coverage_fns are all astronomy math with no date-format coverage, and the new RSS feed needs RFC-822 dates — one genuinely-needed, fully-testable pure fn that plugs a real gap rather than another decorative widget.
